guardrails: W1.5.227 is a planning slice only; it must not implement runtime/Desktop production behavior.
All route package and routed blocker follow-up items must remain planned_not_implemented.
accepted_items and implemented_items must remain zero.
EXIT-P1-1 and EXIT-P1-10 must remain not_ready.
FR-015 restore, continue execution, and snapshot ledger projection remain blocked while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
Dependency-gated desktop surfaces remain blocked until their dependency gates are approved.
M1.6 demo, CW-Bench, and completed-run replay evidence remain deferred outside W1.5.227.

Evidence remains metadata-only and must not include raw prompt, model output, uploaded bytes, raw artifact body, full destination path, secure path, cache path, output directory, or credential values.

W1.5.226 records routed package decisions only and does not implement runtime/Desktop behavior.
